October 28, 2022 
To 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Exchange Plaza, C - 1, Block G 
Bandra Kurla Complex 
Sandra - (E) 
Mumbai - 400 051 
Symbol: INDIGO 
Dear Sir / Ma'am, 
IGAL/SECT/10-22/06 
To 
Department of Corporate SeNices 
BSE Limited 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai - 400 001 
Scrip Code: 539448 
Sub 
Intimation for Board Meeting and Earnings Call under Regulation 29 and 30 of the 
SEBI {Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 
("SEBI LODR Regulations") 
In compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, we would like to inform you that a 
meeting of the Board of Directors of lnterGlobe Aviation Limited ("Company") is scheduled to be
held on Friday, November 4, 2022, inter-alia, to consider and approve the unaudited standalone and 
consolidated financial results of the Company for the quarter and half year ended on September 30, 
2022 ("Financial Results"), subject to a limited review by the Statutory Auditors.
Further, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, the schedule of earnings 
call in relation thereto is enclosed. 
This is for your information and record. 
Thanking you, 
Aviation Limited 
( 
X.1 Compliance Officer 
lnterGlobe Aviation Limited 
Registered Office: Upper Ground Floor, Thopor House, Gate No. 2, Western Wing, 124 Jonpoth, New Deihl - 110 001, Indio, M +91 9650098905, 
F +91 11 43513200,Emoll: corporote@golndlgo.in 
Corporate Office: Levell, Tower c, Global 6uslness Porli, MG Rood, Gurgoon - 122 002, Horvono, Indio. T +91 124 435 2500. F + 91 124 406 8536 
golndlgo.ln 
f.:

InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Results on 
November 04, 2022 
Gurugram, October 28, 2022: IndiGo will be announcing its Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 results on 
November 04, 2022. 
 
The Company will conduct a 60 minutes conference call at 17:00 hours IST on November 04, 2022 
(open to investors/ analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the Company’s
qa_section:
performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference call, please dial 
the numbers provided below. 
 
Results will be available around 16:00 hours on Friday, November 04, 2022 at the Company’s website 
(www.goindigo.in) or on the exchange website (www.nseindia.com / www.bseindia.com). 
 
The call will also be recorded and will be archived at www.goindigo.in. In addition, a transcript of the 
conference call will be available on www.goindigo.in 
 
Date and Time 
November 04, 2022 at: 
17:00 hours IST 
19:30 hours HKT 
11:30 hours UTC 
07:30 hours ET 
Hate to Wait? Pre-register at the following URL and get your unique dial-in details for 
the call
